steps.title: Use two days of data
steps.content: At birth, $x=0$ and the calf weighs $226$ pounds. After $1$ day, it has gained $3$ pounds, so the weight is $229$ pounds. The two points are $(0,226)$ and $(1,229)$.

steps.title: Find the line from the data
steps.content: The starting weight is the $y$-intercept, $226$. The calf gains $3$ pounds each day, so the slope is $3$. The model is $$y=226+3x$$

steps.title: Eliminate the other choices
steps.content: Choice A matches the relationship. Choice B has the wrong sign because the calf gains weight. Choice C swaps the starting value and daily gain. Choice D starts at $3$ and decreases by $226$ per day. Choice A is correct.
